lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Greetings, fellow warrior. I am Ajjat, former black knight and now training officer here in the warrior guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about skillcapes, please?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Skillcapes, also known as Capes of Accomplishment, are reserved for the elite of the elite. Only a person who has truly mastered a skill can buy one, and even then a skillcape can only be bought from one who is

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: recognised as the highest skilled in the land at any particular skill.

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: I have the privilege of being the person that controls access to the Skillcape of Attack, which Kamfreena will recognize and allow you to access her Cyclopes without the need for guild tokens.

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Black Knight? Why are you here?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Indeed I was, however their... methods... did not match with my ideals.. so I left. Harrallak, recognising my talent as a warrior, took me in and offered me a job here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... well if Harrallak trusts you, I guess I can.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the Dummy Room all about?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Ahh yes, the dummies. Another ingenious invention of the noble Dwarf Gamfred. They're mechanical you see and pop up out of the floor. You have to hit them with the correct attack mode before they disappear again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how do I tell which one is which?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: There are two different ways. One indication is their colour, the other is the pose and weapons they are holding, for instance, the one holding daggers you will need to hit with a piercing attack.

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: In the room you will find a poster on the wall which can help you recognise each different dummy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds ingenious!

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Indeed, you may find that you need several weapons to be successful 100% of the time, but keep trying. The weapons shop upstairs may help you there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Of course! Here you go, you've earned [amount] tokens!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: I'm afraid you have not earned any tokens yet. Try some of the activities around the guild to earn some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll go see what I can find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Farewell warrior. Stay away from the dark side.

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Greetings, fellow warrior. I am Ajjat, former black knight and now training officer here in the warrior guild.

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Ah, but I can see you are already a master in the fine art of attacking, perhaps you have come to me to purchase a Cape of Attack, and thus join the elite few who have mastered this exacting skill?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: When wearing this cape, Kamfreena will recognize your ability and allow you to access her Cyclopes without the need for guild tokens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I buy a Skillcape of Attack, please?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Most certainly; unfortunately being such a prestigious item, they are appropriately expensive. I'm afraid I must ask you for the princely sum of 99000 gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 99000! Are you mad?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Not at all; there are many other adventurers who would love the opportunity to purchase such a prestigious item! You can find me here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would gladly pay such a paltry sum for a splendid cape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Well come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I buy a Skillcape of Attack, please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Ajjat
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!
